task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "选择满足条件的MP3文件（清晰语音、无背景噪音、适中音量）"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "将MP3文件转换为WAV格式以便处理"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "加载音频数据并计算音频时长"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "计算音频的RMS值以判断音量是否正常"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "通过静音段分析背景噪音水平"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "检测音频最大振幅以判断是否存在爆音"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "计算信噪比以评估音频清晰度"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "输出音频分析报告并提供改进建议"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "加载Whisper语音识别模型"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "将音频分割为适合处理的小片段"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "逐段执行语音转文字任务"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "按顺序合并转录的文字内容"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将转录结果保存为TXT文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "convertFormat"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "loadAudioData"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "analyzeVolume"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "analyzeNoiseLevel"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "detectClipping"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "calculateSNR"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node9", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "splitAudio"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "transcribeSegment"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "mergeTranscription"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "saveToFile"}]}
